headline: Berkshire Hathaway Reports Decline In Q3 Operating Earnings, Further Reduces Apple Stake
summary: Berkshire Hathaway reported a decline in Q3 operating earnings amid ongoing Apple stake sales, while its cash reserves reached a record $325.2 billion.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Tesla, Alphabet, Trump Media, Super Micro — Trader Predicts Dogecoin Rally Above 20 Cents In November
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.

headline: These 10 Stocks Were S&P 500's Worst Performers In Biden's First Year: Could Trend Continue If Harris Wins 2024 Election?
summary: The S&P 500 enjoyed a strong year in 2021, the first year with Joe Biden in the White House. Not all stocks were up and past results could show sectors to avoid ahead of the 2024 election.

headline: Honda's Pickup Beats Tesla Cybertruck As Most American Made Truck
summary: Japanese automaker Honda's 2025 Ridgeline AWD pickup truck is the most American-made truck with 75% of its content sourced from either the U.S. or Canada.

headline: Apple's iPhone 17 Base Models Could Finally Get This Highly Requested 'Pro' Feature
summary: Apple is set to equip its entire iPhone 17 lineup with LTPO panels, exclusively sourced from Samsung Display and LG Display.

headline: Nvidia Rides AI Wave To Replace Intel On Dow Jones Industrial Average, Ending Its 25-Year Run
summary: Nvidia is set to replace Intel on the Dow Jones Industrial Average, marking a shift in the semiconductor industry as Nvidia rises with AI-driven demand while Intel struggles with market share and profitability challenges.

headline: Tesla Investor Says EV Giant Will 'Admit' It Needs Lidar Despite Elon Musk Calling It A Crutch
summary: Tesla investor says they'll need Lidar for autonomous driving at some point. Lidar uses laser light to map objects and surfaces.
